name: Snipetron
description: Manufactured by the Corpus, the Snipetron is a powerful and accurate rifle that sports optical zoom capabilities. Perfect for long range engagements.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Manufactured by the Corpus, the Snipetron is a powerful and accurate rifle that sports optical zoom capabilities. Perfect for long range engagements.

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.6 + 22.0.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the headshot damage of the Vulkar series, Snipetron series and Vectis series in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.4.2
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the damage of the Snipetron in Conclave.
Decreased the damage of the Snipetron Vandal in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.8 + 21.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Snipetron Rivens are now an option for Rifle Rivens!

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Snipetron Vandal in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Recurring Dreams + Hotfix 1
patchlogs.changes: Rubico, Snipetron series and Vectis series Headshot multiplier returned to their intended 2x multiplier in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.additions: Added custom weapon reloads to a variety of weapons that were re-using old reloads (Snipetron, Embolist, ec).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.12.2
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed not being able to trade the Dera Vandal Blueprint, Karak Wraith Blueprint, Strun Wraith Blueprint, Snipetron Vandal Blueprint/Barrel and Sheev Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.8.0
patchlogs.changes: •    Snipetron Vandal Blueprint is now tradable!

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Reduced the damage of the Snipetron Vandal in Conclave.
Fixed an issue that caused the Snipetron to skip reload animations.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Snipetron series in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.6.2
patchlogs.changes: The Snipetron weapon series is now available in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive
patchlogs.fixes: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive Psa: The Launcher May Require You To Enter Your Windows Administrator Password To Update Your Firewall Rules.Avalanche Offensive Is On Until Monday @ 12 Noon Edt! Avalanche Offensivedefeat The Corpus Arctic Eximus!A Message From Cantis Of The Red Veil Resistance:Here'S What You'Ll Need To Dogo Forth And Take Down The Corpus Arctic Eximus, Tenno!Additions:Weapon Balance Changes:     • Grakata    • Castanas    • Ogris    • Torid    • Penta    • Lanka    • Vectis    • Vulkar    • Angstrum:    • Acrid:    • Attica:    • Spectra & Flux Rifle:    • Snipetron (+Vandal):    • Torid Changes:    • All Launchers:Key Hosting Improvements:Changes:Fixes:

patchlogs.name: Update 13.5.0: Edo Armor & Nami Solo
patchlogs.changes: Fixed issue with Shock Camo skin not working on Snipetron Vandal.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Updated reload sound effects for Snipetron, Snipetron Vandal, and Torid

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Lato Vandal, Latron Prime, Lato Prime, Snipetron Vandal, Sobek updated fire sounds.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3.3
patchlogs.fixes: Updated Snipetron & Snipetron Vandal sound FX

patchlogs.name: Update 7.10.0: Weekend Extermination Event!
patchlogs.changes: Snipetron now has Armor Piercing damage by default, but with a slight increase to recoil.
